sections.title: Active Voice
points: Active voice is direct and clear.

sections.title: Passive Voice
points: Example: 'The food was cooked by Kiki.'
Use passive when the action or result is more important than the doer.

sections.text: Remember: Passive voice uses a form of 'be' plus the past participle.

cards.fact: Object + be + past participle (+ by agent).
The key structure for passive sentences.
